TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Patrice_Talon, title = Patrice_Talon, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Patrice_Talon} }

S.FORM: Patrice Talon ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 5, Patrice Talon, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Benin ta' misuw hya' ga Patrice Talon, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Patrice Talon ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 5, Patrice Talon, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Benin ta' misuw hya' ga Patrice Talon, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: patriʦ~ʨe talon rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, patriʦ~ʨe talon, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βenin taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa patriʦ~ʨe talon, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
